parameters.content:
## Fill ANY PDF — reviewed AI vision

This variant handles forms you have **not** templated. It renders every detected page and uses two separate vision passes:

1. map the supplied data to labelled fields;
2. render those exact values and independently review the filled pages.

The workflow calls `fill_pdf` only when the second pass returns an explicit approval with no issues. A rejected or malformed review stops the run.

**Setup:**
1. JustFill API key → https://justfill.app/account → API keys
2. OpenRouter API key → https://openrouter.ai/keys
3. Paste both into the **Config** node.

Default model: `google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite`. Choose another OpenRouter vision model if needed. Expect two model calls per run.

**Trade-off:** automated visual review reduces silent mistakes but is still probabilistic. Use `fill-pdf-workflow.json` (saved template, deterministic field mapping) for recurring or high-stakes documents.

parameters.formDescription: Upload a PDF (no template needed) and describe the data to put in it.
